en: We have watched with disgust as your technological advancements have been overseen by a child
ko: 우리는 당신들의 기술 발전이 한 아이에 의해

en: who scoffs at tradition. Which of these means to oversee, to supervise, to watch, to ruin?
To oversee means to watch over and supervise a job or an activity to make certain that it is being done correctly.
ko: Oversee는 일이나 활동이 올바르게 수행되고 있는지

en: This will be the first Wakandan international outreach center.
ko: 여기가 최초의 와칸다 국제 봉사 센터가 될 것입니다.

en: Nakia will oversee the social outreach. If we say that someone scoffs, we mean that they laugh
ko: Nakia가 사회 봉사를 감독할 것입니다. scoff는 누군가를 비웃으며

en: and talk about a person or an idea in a way that shows that they think that they or it is stupid or silly.
ko: 그 사람이나 아이디어가 멍청하거나 어리석다고 생각한다는 걸 보여주는 방식으로
